verdict: This antioxidant powerhouse combines caffeine's depuffing action with EGCG's potent free-radical protection and anti-inflammatory benefits. The high review count (7800) reflects consistent real-world efficacy, particularly for under-eye darkness and morning puffiness.

_research.name: Caffeine Solution 5% + EGCG Serum
_research.con: Caffeine results are temporary (4-6 hours) rather than cumulative structural improvement.
